UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user's profile information within the Nota Dentro platform.

uid.description: The unique user ID from Firebase Auth.

username.description: The user's unique username for the Nota Dentro platform.

profileImage.description: URL of the user's profile image.

experience.description: The user's total experience points (XP) on the platform.

instagramProfile.description: URL of the user's Instagram profile.

linkedInProfile.description: URL of the user's LinkedIn profile.
